info.title: Workable API
info.description: Workable recruiting platform API v3 providing access to jobs, candidates, stages, members, departments, locations, requisitions, employees, events, subscriptions, and time off management.

get.description: Returns a collection of account jobs
Returns the application form for a job
Returns screening questions for a job
Returns pipeline stages for a job
Returns hiring team members for a job
Returns custom attributes for a job

post.description: Creates a new candidate for a job
Moves a candidate to a different stage
Copies a candidate to another job
Adds a comment to a candidate

get.description: Returns offer details for a candidate
Returns scheduled events for a candidate
Returns files attached to a candidate

post.description: Uploads a document for an employee
